languages.text: "Я — Таддуа Кровавые Руки. Палач в пятом колене и скромный послушник этого железного святого, Звездное Сиятельство".

traits.locale_text: "Я Урсус Кровавые Руки. Палач в пятом колене и скромный послушник этого железного святого, Ваше Звездное Сиятельство".

languages.text: "I am Taddua the Scorched, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."
languages.original_text: "Я — Урсус Кровавые Руки. Палач в пятом колене и скромный послушник этого железного святого, Звездное Сиятельство".

traits.locale_text: "I am Ursus Bloodhands, A slaughterman in the fifth generation and a humble disciple of the iron saint before you, Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}"
"I am Ursus Bloodhands, A slaughterman in the fifth generation and a humble disciple of the iron saint before you, Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}"
"I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}"

"I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."
"I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."

languages.text: “我是乌苏斯·血手，第五代刽子手，也是您面前这位钢铁圣人谦卑的学徒，来自上界的大人。”
languages.original_text: "I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."

traits.locale_text: “我是乌苏斯·血手，第五代刽子手，也是您面前这位钢铁圣人谦卑的学徒，来自上界的大人。”

languages.text: «Soy Ursus Manosrojas, matarife de quinta generación y humilde discípulo del santo de hierro que tiene ante usted, Excelencia Celestial».
languages.original_text: "I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."

traits.locale_text: «Soy Ursus Manosrojas, matarife de quinta generación y humilde discípulo del santo de hierro que tiene ante usted, Excelencia Celestial».

languages.text: "Ben beşinci nesil cellat Ursus Bloodhands. Önünüzde gördüğünüz demir azizin naçizane bir müridiyim Semavi Efendimiz."
languages.original_text: "I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."

traits.locale_text: "Ben beşinci nesil cellat Ursus Bloodhands. Önünüzde gördüğünüz demir azizin naçizane bir müridiyim Semavi Efendimiz."

languages.text: 「天の閣下、私は、アーサス・ブラッドハンズ、5代目の死刑執行人で、あなたの前に見えている鉄の聖者のしがない門弟の一人です」
languages.original_text: "I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."

traits.locale_text: 「天の閣下、私は、アーサス・ブラッドハンズ、5代目の死刑執行人で、あなたの前に見えている鉄の聖者のしがない門弟の一人です」

languages.text: « Ursus Mains-Sanglantes, pour vous servir. Bourreau de la cinquième génération et humble disciple du saint de fer que vous avez sous les yeux, Votre Altesse Célestissime. »
languages.original_text: "I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."

traits.locale_text: « Ursus Mains-Sanglantes, pour vous servir. Bourreau de la cinquième génération et humble disciple du saint de fer que vous avez sous les yeux, Votre Altesse Célestissime. »

languages.text: "Ich bin Ursus Bluthand, Schlächter in fünfter Generation und demütiger Jünger des eisernen Heiligen, den Ihr vor Euch seht, Eure himmlische Hoheit."
languages.original_text: "I am Ursus Bloodhands, a slaughterman of the fifth generation, and a humble disciple of the iron saint you see before you, Your Celestial Highness."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin Ursus Bluthand, Schlächter in fünfter Generation und demütiger Jünger des eisernen Heiligen, den Ihr vor Euch seht, Eure himmlische Hoheit."
